input_text: Memang la orang kaya je yang boleh pergi hospital swasta. Sistem kesihatan ni memang tak adil.
reason: Class-based frustration about healthcare inequality, highlighting systemic issue with bitter tone.
suggested_rewrite: Jurang kualiti antara hospital kerajaan dan swasta perlu ditangani. Semua rakyat berhak mendapat perkhidmatan kesihatan yang berkualiti.

input_text: This developer really cut corners on the construction. Walls cracking, tiles falling, plumbing leaking. Should be ashamed.
reason: Harsh developer criticism about poor construction quality, frustrated home buyer.
suggested_rewrite: The construction quality of this development has serious defects. I'm documenting all issues for a formal complaint under the defect liability period.

input_text: Pendidikan di Malaysia makin merosot. Ranking pun jatuh. Tapi asyik tukar menteri je. Tak ada visi.
reason: Frustrated education policy criticism about declining rankings and frequent minister changes.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia perlu strategi pendidikan jangka panjang yang konsisten tanpa mengira perubahan politik. Kestabilan dasar pendidikan penting untuk kemajuan.

input_text: 每次下暴雨都会停电。电力公司到底在做什么？是不是故意的？
reason: Frustrated utility complaint about power outages during rain, questioning if deliberate.
suggested_rewrite: 暴雨期间频繁停电说明电力基础设施需要升级。电力公司应投资防雨设备和快速恢复系统。

input_text: இந்த சாலையில் விபத்து ஏற்பட்டால் அரசாங்கம்தான் பொறுப்பு. எத்தனை முறை புகார் செய்தும் கவனிக்கவில்லை.
reason: Asserting government liability for road accidents due to ignored complaints, frustrated but valid safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த சாலையின் பாதுகாப்பின்மை குறித்து பல முறை புகார் செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது. அரசாங்கம் இதை உடனடியாக கவனிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Aiyo, setiap bulan ada je kenaikan harga barang. Gaji sama je tapi harga semua naik. Hidup susah betul.
reason: Frustrated about rising cost of living with stagnant wages, common economic anxiety.
suggested_rewrite: Kos sara hidup terus meningkat manakala pertumbuhan gaji perlahan. Kerajaan perlu mempertimbangkan langkah-langkah untuk membantu golongan B40 dan M40.

input_text: Service at the immigration office is terrible. Rude staff, long wait, and they still can't get your name right on the passport.
reason: Multiple complaints about immigration office service - rudeness, delays, errors. Harsh but focused on service quality.
suggested_rewrite: The immigration office experience needs improvement in staff courtesy, wait times, and data accuracy. An efficient appointment system would help significantly.

input_text: Ahli politik cakap nak tolong rakyat tapi beli kereta mewah setiap tahun. Hipokrit betul la diorang ni.
reason: Calling politicians hypocrites for luxury purchases while claiming to serve the people, populist criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Wakil rakyat perlu menunjukkan gaya hidup yang sepadan dengan amanah yang diberikan. Ketelusan dalam pengisytiharan harta adalah penting.

input_text: LRT ni memang sardine can every morning. Tambah gerabak la sikit. Macam mana nak encourage public transport kalau macam ni?
reason: Overcrowding complaint about LRT with sardine can metaphor, frustrated commuter advocating improvement.
suggested_rewrite: LRT overcrowding during rush hours is a major issue. Increasing train frequency or adding carriages would encourage more people to use public transport.

input_text: Rumah teres baru beli dah ada masalah. Atap bocor, dinding retak. Developer pun tak nak tanggungjawab. Memang menipu.
reason: Angry new home buyer complaining about defects and unresponsive developer, accusing of fraud.
suggested_rewrite: Rumah baru saya mempunyai kecacatan serius. Saya akan mendokumentasikan semua masalah dan melaporkan kepada Tribunal Tuntutan Pembeli Rumah jika pemaju tidak bertindak.

input_text: Social media influencers really are the worst. Promoting products they've never used. Zero integrity, all about money.
reason: Cynical generalization about influencer ethics, frustrated consumer trust issue.
suggested_rewrite: Consumers should be aware that influencer endorsements may not always reflect genuine experiences. Better advertising disclosure rules would help build trust.

input_text: Lepas hujan besar, sampah berterbangan merata-rata. Pengurusan sisa pepejal kat Malaysia memang gagal.
reason: Environmental criticism about waste management failure after heavy rain, blunt but valid observation.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pengurusan sisa pepejal perlu dipertingkatkan terutama semasa musim hujan. Tong sampah tahan banjir dan penyelenggaraan yang lebih kerap diperlukan.

input_text: 那个餐厅的服务态度太差了。服务员好像我们欠他钱一样。以后不会再去了。
reason: Harsh restaurant service complaint, feeling treated rudely by staff.
suggested_rewrite: 这家餐厅的服务态度需要改善。我会通过评价平台分享我的体验，希望管理层能注意到并加强员工培训。

input_text: Kes ragut makin banyak tapi polis macam tak ambil kisah. Buat report pun macam buang masa je.
reason: Frustration about rising snatch theft and perceived police indifference, safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: Kes ragut yang meningkat memerlukan perhatian serius daripada pihak berkuasa. Saya harap PDRM dapat menambah rondaan dan menyiasat setiap laporan dengan teliti.

input_text: Why is everything so expensive in Malaysia nowadays? Minimum wage barely covers basic expenses. Something needs to change.
reason: Economic frustration about cost of living vs minimum wage, common populist concern.
suggested_rewrite: The gap between minimum wage and cost of living is concerning. A comprehensive review of wages, price controls, and social safety nets is needed.

input_text: Makcik cleaner kat office ni selalu lambat datang. Pagi-pagi toilet dah busuk. Tapi complain pun tak guna.
reason: Workplace hygiene complaint about cleaning staff tardiness, frustrated but directed at service quality.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan tandas pejabat pada waktu pagi memerlukan perhatian. Saya akan berbincang dengan pihak pengurusan untuk memperbaiki jadual pembersihan.

input_text: இந்த பேருந்து நிலையத்தின் நிலை மிகவும் மோசமாக உள்ளது. சுத்தமில்லை, ஒழுங்கில்லை, பாதுகாப்பு இல்லை.
reason: Triple complaint about bus station - cleanliness, order, and safety. Frustrated public infrastructure critique.
suggested_rewrite: பேருந்து நிலையத்தின் தூய்மை, ஒழுங்கு மற்றும் பாதுகாப்பு மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். இதை உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளிடம் முறையாக புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Dah bertahun-tahun complaint pasal lampu jalan rosak tapi takde tindakan. Kalau jadi apa-apa, sapa nak tanggungjawab?
reason: Years-long frustration about broken street lights and liability concern, persistent civic complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Lampu jalan yang rosak menjejaskan keselamatan penduduk. Saya akan mengemukakan aduan bertulis dengan nombor rujukan untuk tindakan susulan.

input_text: Tol kat Malaysia ni memang banyak sangat. Bayar cukai jalan, bayar tol lagi. Double charge namanya tu.
reason: Frustration about toll system on top of road tax, calling it double charging.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem tol dan cukai jalan memerlukan semakan. Pendekatan bersepadu yang tidak membebankan rakyat berganda perlu dipertimbangkan.

input_text: Building management collect so much money but common area still dirty. Where does all the money go? Very suspicious.
reason: Suspicion about building management funds with dirty common areas, frustrated condo resident.
suggested_rewrite: The maintenance fees don't seem to reflect the quality of common area upkeep. I'll request a financial audit at the next AGM.

input_text: Nak beli rumah kat Malaysia sekarang macam mimpi je. Harga gila mahal tapi gaji tak naik-naik.
reason: Housing affordability frustration expressing how home ownership feels like a dream, economic anxiety.
suggested_rewrite: Krisis mampu milik rumah memerlukan penyelesaian segera. Lebih banyak rumah mampu milik dan skim pembiayaan yang fleksibel diperlukan untuk generasi muda.

input_text: 这个公共游泳池的水都变绿了还在营业。管理部门的眼睛是瞎的吗？
reason: Harsh public pool maintenance complaint about green water, questioning management oversight.
suggested_rewrite: 公共游泳池的水质需要定期检测和维护。发现水变色应立即关闭进行处理，确保泳客安全。

input_text: Setiap tahun cakap nak selesaikan masalah banjir tapi setiap tahun banjir juga. All talk no action.
reason: Recurring flood frustration criticizing annual unfulfilled promises, code-switched political criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah banjir tahunan memerlukan penyelesaian jangka panjang, bukan hanya respons kecemasan. Long-term infrastructure investment is needed, including better drainage systems and flood mitigation measures.

input_text: Memang la Malaysia punya bureaucracy yang paling teruk. Nak buat satu benda kena pergi 5 jabatan. Bazir masa rakyat je.
reason: Frustrated bureaucracy criticism about needing to visit multiple agencies, accusing waste of people's time.
suggested_rewrite: Proses birokrasi boleh dipermudahkan dengan pusat sehenti atau perkhidmatan digital bersepadu supaya rakyat tidak perlu berurusan dengan banyak jabatan.

input_text: So annoying when restaurants charge extra for ice and plain water. Everything also want to squeeze money from customers.
reason: Consumer frustration about restaurant water charges, feeling nickel-and-dimed.
suggested_rewrite: Charging for basic amenities like water can frustrate customers. Restaurants should be transparent about pricing so diners can make informed choices.

input_text: Dah la highway sentiasa ada construction, speed pun kena kurangkan. Bayar tol mahal tapi jalan macam obstacle course.
reason: Highway construction frustration with toll-vs-quality comparison, common driver complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja-kerja penyelenggaraan highway yang berterusan memang menjejaskan perjalanan. Mungkin kontraktor boleh lebih menyelaras kerja supaya kurang mengganggu pengguna.

input_text: Kenapa la ada orang baling sampah dari kereta. Memang tak ada civic mindedness langsung. Memalukan.
reason: Shaming people who litter from cars, frustrated environmental complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Membuang sampah dari kereta bukan sahaja mencemarkan alam tetapi juga membahayakan pengguna jalan lain. Penguatkuasaan denda yang lebih ketat boleh membantu mengubah tabiat ini.

input_text: Hospital appointment at 9am but only see doctor at 1pm. By then I've wasted my whole day. System broken la.
reason: Extremely frustrated hospital wait-time complaint, calling system broken.
suggested_rewrite: Waiting 4 hours past your appointment time is unacceptable. Hospital appointment systems need reform - perhaps staggered appointment slots and real-time queue updates could help.
